zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Latimer於1343年出生時，她的父親William Latimer 4th Baron13歲，母親Elizabeth FitzAlan23歲。她於1381年10月9日之前與John Neville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年11月5日在英國貝德福爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Latimer was born in 1343, her father, William Latimer 4th Baron, was 13 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzAlan, was 23. She married John Neville before 9 October 1381. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 November 1395, in Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Latimer est née en 1343, son père, William Latimer 4th Baron, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzAlan, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Neville avant 9 octobre 1381. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 novembre 1395, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Latimer 1343 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Latimer 4th Baron 13 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth FitzAlan 23. Sie hat vor 9. Oktober 1381 John Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. November 1395 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Latimerが1343年に生まれた時，父William Latimer 4th Baronは13歳，母Elizabeth FitzAlanは23歳であった。1381年10月9日以前にJohn Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1395年11月5日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Latimer(이)가 1343년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Latimer 4th Baron(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzAlan(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1381년 10월 9일 이전 John Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 11월 5일 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Latimer nasceu em 1343, seu pai, William Latimer 4th Baron, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Neville antes 9 de outubro de 1381. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1395, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Latimer родилась в 1343 г., её отцу по имени William Latimer 4th Baron было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzAlan, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Neville перед 9 октябрь 1381 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 ноября 1395 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.
